description: GPU-memory anchor. GPU tile frequency is the main useful knob; performance factor is a guarded experiment.

knobs.name: GPU_CORE_FREQUENCY_MAX_CONTROL
knobs.reason: Expected to save energy with small bandwidth loss on GPU-memory-bound Triad.

knobs.name: LEVELZERO::GPU_CORE_PERFORMANCE_FACTOR_CONTROL
knobs.reason: May bias PVC toward memory behavior; runner must read back because writes may be refused.
